name: Asian Steak and Asparagus Noodle Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Chili paste or hot sauce
recipeInstructions:
DRESSING:
1/3 cup Peanut butter
1/4 cup Soy sauce
3 tbsp Lime juice
1 tbsp Sesame oil
2 tbsp Water
1 tsp Sugar
1/2 tsp Chili paste
1 clove Garlic
1/4 cup Fresh chopped Coriander
1. Cut asparagus diagonally into 1 1/2 inch lengths.
2. Peel and slice carrots diagonally.
3. Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, lime juice, water, oil, sugar, chili paste, and garlic in a salad bowl until smooth.
4. In a wok, heat vegetable oil over high heat. Stir-fry beef, garlic, cumin, and chili paste for 2-3 minutes or until the beef is browned but still pink inside. Add lime juice and stir-fry for 15 seconds.
5. Add the beef mixture to the dressing and toss to coat.
6. Cook noodles, asparagus, and carrots in a large pot of boiling salted water for 4 minutes or until the noodles are firm and vegetables are tender crisp. Drain under running water, then drain again and add to the bowl with the beef mixture. Toss everything together until well coated.
7. Garnish with fresh coriander.
